course.fullname: Hackathon Pathway 4 of 4: Data and Integration Foundations
course.summary: Course 4 of 4 in the First-Time Hackathon Pathway. Bridges beginner technical literacy into BigQuery Agent Tools, Following Policies with RAG, and Using MCP with Maps, then ends with a final rehearsal of the two-day flow.

sections.title: Two-day rehearsal aligned to the track
